summary: Record the aggregate suite after adding the C11 MCP contract foundation: all 166 test files and 1252 tests pass.

decisions.decision: Retain one bounded aggregate run after MCP contract addition; do not infer stdio-server readiness from local unit counts.
decisions.rationale: The contract module crosses application boundaries but is not the server. Aggregate green is necessary regression evidence, not AC-11.b completion.

testEvidence.criterion: The full local repository suite remains green after the MCP contract foundation.
testEvidence.test: Run one bounded aggregate test command after the focused MCP suite.

red.outcome: RED: the earlier aggregate run was blocked by a scheduler-sensitive timing assertion later corrected; no MCP behavior failure was observed.

green.outcome: GREEN: Test Files 166 passed (166); Tests 1252 passed (1252); Duration 19.47s.

questions: The stdio server and AC-11.b/c remain pending.
attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
